items_flat.title_en: Anthropic Commits $10M CAD to Canadian AI Research
items_flat.title_zh: Anthropic 承諾投資 1000 萬加元支持加拿大 AI 研究
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced a $10 million CAD investment in Canadian AI research institutions including Amii, Mila, Vector Institute, and several universities and health organizations. The funding supports beneficial AI applications in areas like reinforcement learning, health, safety, and responsible AI. They also released data showing strong Canadian adoption of Claude.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布投資 1000 萬加元予加拿大 AI 研究機構，包括 Amii、Mila、Vector Institute 及多所大學與健康組織。資金用於支持強化學習、健康、安全及負責任 AI 等有益應用。他們也發布數據顯示加拿大 Claude 使用率高。
items_flat.quote: Canadian institutions and researchers have played a critical role in the modern AI era... That’s why we’re committing $10 million CAD to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of this work.
items_flat.quote_zh: 加拿大機構與研究人員在現代 AI 時代扮演關鍵角色……這就是我們承諾投資 1000 萬加元支持加拿大研究機構的原因，以資助下一代工作。

items_flat.title_en: Demis Hassabis Calls for U.S.-Led Frontier AI Oversight Framework
items_flat.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國領導前沿 AI 監督框架
items_flat.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a call for urgent U.S.-led oversight of frontier AI models, proposing a standards body to test capabilities, develop best practices, and address risks like cybersecurity and deceptive AI as AGI approaches. Shared via X and covered in press.
items_flat.summary_zh: Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 發文呼籲美國領導前沿 AI 模型監督，建議成立標準機構測試能力、制定最佳實務，並因應接近 AGI 時的網路安全與欺騙性 AI 等風險。透過 X 分享並獲媒體報導。

items_flat.title_en: OpenAI Reports Explosive Growth for GPT-5.6 Sol
items_flat.title_zh: OpenAI 報告 GPT-5.6 Sol 使用量爆炸性成長
items_flat.summary_en: Sam Altman highlighted insane growth of GPT-5.6 Sol, with the inference team scaling to meet demand. OpenAI reset usage limits for Codex and ChatGPT Work reaching 8M active users. ChatGPT release notes confirm recent search and WhatsApp updates.
items_flat.summary_zh: Sam Altman 強調 GPT-5.6 Sol 使用量成長驚人，推理團隊全力擴展以滿足需求。OpenAI 為達 800 萬活躍用戶的 Codex 與 ChatGPT Work 重置使用限制。ChatGPT 發布筆記確認近期搜尋與 WhatsApp 更新。
items_flat.quote: 5.6 sol growth is insane. the inference team has done heroic work...
items_flat.quote_zh: 5.6 sol 成長超瘋狂。推理團隊做了英雄般的工作……

google.title_en: Demis Hassabis Calls for U.S.-Led Frontier AI Oversight Framework
google.title_zh: Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國領導前沿 AI 監督框架
google.summary_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis published a call for urgent U.S.-led oversight of frontier AI models, proposing a standards body to test capabilities, develop best practices, and address risks like cybersecurity and deceptive AI as AGI approaches. Shared via X and covered in press.

brief_en: OpenAI scales GPT-5.6 Sol usage amid massive growth. Anthropic invests $10M CAD in Canadian AI research partnerships. Google DeepMind's Demis Hassabis calls for U.S.-led frontier AI oversight framework. Minor updates across labs; no major new model releases today.
brief_zh: OpenAI 大幅擴展 GPT-5.6 Sol 使用量以應對爆炸性成長。Anthropic 投資 1000 萬加元支持加拿大 AI 研究合作。Google DeepMind 執行長 Demis Hassabis 呼籲美國領導前沿 AI 監督框架。各實驗室今日無重大新模型發布。
